extraction.text: Patient was informed by Dr. ABC that he does not need sleep study as per patient.,PHYSICAL EXAMINATION:,General:  Pleasant, brighter.,Vital signs:  117/78, 12, 56.,Abdomen:  Soft, nontender.  Bowel sounds normal.,ASSESSMENT AND PLAN:,1.  Constipation.  Milk of Magnesia 30 mL daily p.r.n., Dulcolax suppository twice a week p.r.n.,2.  CAD/angina.  See cardiologist this afternoon.,Call me if constipation not resolved by a.m., consider a Fleet enema then as discussed.,
